---
name: Release claim review
about: Check that release-facing language is supported by implementation and tests
title: "Release claim review: "
labels: release-claims
assignees: ""
---

## Claim

What wording needs review?

## Evidence

What implementation, tests, or docs support it?

## Risk

Could this imply unsupported anonymity, encryption, video, SASE, or zero-trust capability?

## Decision

Should the claim be accepted, limited, rejected, or moved to future work?
